title: beskid pckg pack --package-kind tool

source.subject: feat(pckg): `beskid pckg pack --package-kind tool` and override-aware profile detection

body:
CLI supports `beskid pckg pack --package-kind tool` with override-aware profile detection for tool packages.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`4579bab`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/4579bab)
- **Subject:** feat(pckg): `beskid pckg pack --package-kind tool` and override-aware profile detection
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `pckg-registry`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
